subject: refactor(graph): remove redundant COMPONENT_COLORS, reuse LABEL_COLORS
body:
COMPONENT_COLORS was a subset of LABEL_COLORS after both were darkened.
Single palette is simpler — connected components now index into
LABEL_COLORS (15 colors instead of 10, slightly better variety).

Tags: graph, cleanup, simplification
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: patch

title: remove redundant COMPONENT_COLORS, reuse LABEL_COLORS
